reasoning: The visualization displays monthly revenue trends for all four years side-by-side (or overlaid) on a single x-axis representing months. While it shows the data correctly, it fails to directly answer the specific question: 'How much revenue was there... in the years 2021-2024'. A business user looking for annual totals would have to mentally sum up 12 bars per year or look for a separate calculation. The chart highlights volatility and seasonality well but obscures the primary metric requested (annual total earnings). Furthermore, without clear grouping or color coding distinction beyond labels, comparing the magnitude of total yearly performance is difficult visually.
suggested_improvement: Create a bar chart with Years (2021-2024) on the X-axis and Total Annual Revenue on the Y-axis. This allows for immediate comparison of the total sales volume per year as requested.
